BeiLuo Infineon Distributor News

Stay up to date with BeiLuo company announcements and Infineon industry insights — stock expansions, FAE support programs, exhibitions, and semiconductor market trends, from an authorized Infineon distributor.

Company News

Company News

BeiLuo Expands Infineon IGBT Stock to Meet Growing Industrial Demand

BeiLuo has significantly expanded its Infineon IGBT inventory to address rising demand from industrial motor drive, power conversion, and renewable energy customers across the Asia-Pacific region.

2024-10-15 Read more →
Company News

BeiLuo Launches Dedicated FAE Support Program for Infineon Customers

BeiLuo formally launches a structured Field Application Engineer (FAE) Support Program offering three service tiers, from online resources to dedicated on-site engineering assistance for Infineon distributor customers.

2024-08-10 Read more →

Industry News

Industry News

Infineon AURIX MCU in Automotive Safety Systems: An Industry Analysis

An in-depth analysis of how Infineon AURIX TC2xx and TC3xx microcontrollers are enabling ISO 26262 functional safety compliance in automotive brake, steering, and EV powertrain applications.

2024-09-20 Read more →
Industry News

Wide Bandgap Semiconductors 2024: Infineon CoolSiC and CoolGaN Market Outlook

An analysis of silicon carbide and gallium nitride market trends in 2024, examining EV traction inverter adoption, Infineon's CoolSiC and CoolGaN product strategies, and implications for OEMs and distributors.

2024-07-05 Read more →
